WHEN-the question word that describes a time
PROCEDURES- the "P" in the acronym TTP
WHERE- the question word that describes a place
TECHNIQUES-the second "T" in the acronym TTP
LIMITATIONS-the "L" in the acronym CALI
HOW-the question word that describes a method
WHO-the question word that describers a person or group

CAPABILITIES- the "C" for CALI
TACTICS-the first "T" in the acronym TTP
INTENTIONS-the "I" in the acronym CALI
ACTIVITIES- the "A" in the acronym CALI
WHAT-the question word that describes a thing or event
